hausa.welcome_to_the_art_design_studio: 🎨 Barka da zuwa Studiyon Fasaha da Ƙira!
hausa.explore_15_interactive_tools_that_teac: Bincika kayan aiki 15 masu hulɗa waɗanda ke koyar da ka'idar launi, fasahar lissafi, ƙira mai samarwa, da sauƙin isa ga gani. Kowane shafi kanbas ne na daban na ƙirƙira. Ga abin da za ka iya ƙirƙira:
hausa.explore_hsl_color_space_interactively: Bincika sararin launi na HSL cikin hulɗa
hausa.mix_paints_with_subtractive_color_theo: Gauraya fenti da ka'idar launi mai raguwa
hausa.create_pixel_art_on_a_grid_canvas: Ƙirƙiri zanen pixel a kan kanbas mai grid
hausa.draw_with_rotational_reflective_symmet: Zana da daidaiton juyawa da na madubi
hausa.flow_fields_particles_starfields_auror: Filayen gudu, ƙwayoyi, filin taurari, aurora
hausa.virtual_spin_painting_with_physics: Fentin juyawa na kwamfuta tare da physics
hausa.geometric_string_patterns_on_pegs: Tsarin zare na geometry a kan ƙusoshi
hausa.repeating_tile_patterns_like_m_c_esche: Tsarin fale-fale masu maimaituwa kamar na M.C. Escher
hausa.design_and_export_css_gradient_pattern: Ƙira ka fitar da tsarin gradient na CSS
hausa.harmony_desc: Bincika jituwar kiɗa, tazarar sauti, da alaƙar da ke tsakanin sauti da gani
hausa.wcag_contrast_checker_for_accessibilit: Mai duba bambancin WCAG domin sauƙin isa
hausa.color_theory_additive_vs_subtractive_m: Ka'idar launi (gaurayawa mai ƙarawa da mai raguwa, launukan cikawa, HSL/RGB), lanƙwasan lissafi (hypotrochoids, Lissajous), fractals da kamanceceniyar kai, geometry na fale-fale, fahimtar gani a Op Art, matakan sauƙin isa na WCAG, da fasahar kwamfuta. Kowane kayan aiki yana koyar da lissafin da ke bayan kyaun.
hausa.hue_0_360_around_the_wheel_saturation_: Hue (0-360 kewaye da dabaran), saturation (tsafta), haske. Na cikawa suna fuskantar juna, na kusa suna maƙwabtaka, na uku suna nesa da 120°. Newton ya sanya bakan haske a kan dabaran a shekarar 1666.
hausa.color_mixer_subtractive_vs_additive: Mai Gauraya Launi — mai raguwa da mai ƙarawa
hausa.paint_and_print_subtractive_cmy_mixes_: Fenti da bugu = mai raguwa (CMY yana gauraya zuwa duhu); haske da allo = mai ƙarawa (RGB yana gauraya zuwa fari). Duniya ɗaya ce, amma lissafi daban-daban gaba ɗaya — na'urar buga takarda tana tunani da faifan K, talabijin kuma tana tunani da Hz.
hausa.pixel_art_bitmap_craft_at_8_8_to_32_32: Zanen Pixel — sana'ar bitmap daga 8×8 zuwa 32×32
hausa.each_pixel_is_a_deliberate_decision_ne: Kowane pixel shawara ce da aka yanke da gangan. An san sprites na NES da sanya jarumi cikin 16×16 da palet mai launi 4. Algorithm ɗin layi na Bresenham yana zana layukan gefe ba tare da lambobin ɗigo ba.
hausa.bilateral_mirror_rotational_n_fold_poi: Na bangarori biyu (madubi), na juyawa (sau n), na aya. Ƙungiyoyi 17 na tsarin bango suna rarraba kowane tsarin 2D mai maimaituwa — dukkan aikin Escher.
hausa.a_small_circle_rolls_inside_a_big_one_: Ƙaramar da'ira tana birgima cikin babbar, alƙalami kuma yana nesa da tsakiya. Rabon radiyoyin biyu yana ƙayyade adadin furanni; nisan kuma yana ƙayyade kauri. An yi rijistar wannan abin wasa a 1965, amma lissafinsa daga shekarun 1700 ne.
hausa.generative_algorithm_randomness_as_art: Mai Samarwa — algorithm + tsautsayi a matsayin mai zane
hausa.sol_lewitt_wrote_instructions_the_wall: Sol LeWitt ya rubuta umarni; wanda ya yi aiki a bango shi ne mai zartarwa. Yau: Processing, p5.js, Cinder. “Mai zane shi ne doka, ba sakamako ba.”
hausa.spin_art_centripetal_physics_in_paint: Zanen Juyawa — physics ɗin ƙarfin ja zuwa tsakiya cikin fenti
hausa.drop_paint_spin_watch_it_fling_outward: Zuba fenti, juya, ka kalli yadda yake watsuwa waje cikin karkarwa. Damien Hirst ya sami miliyoyi da sayar da zanen juyawa. Physics ɗin nan ne kamar na na'urar bushe salati; F = mω²r.
hausa.string_art_curves_from_straight_lines: Zanen Zare — lanƙwasa daga layuka madaidaita
hausa.connect_every_n_th_nail_an_envelope_cu: Haɗa kowace ƙusa ta n; sai lanƙwasar ambulaf ta bayyana. Mary Everest Boole ta gabatar da wannan a matsayin lissafin aji kusan shekarar 1900. Cardioid da aka yi da layuka madaidaita har yanzu tana burgewa.
hausa.bridget_riley_s_moir_fields_vasarely_s: Filayen moiré na Bridget Riley, grid ɗin Vasarely. Ƙwayoyin gefe na kwakwalwa masu gano motsi suna wuce gona da iri a kan bambanci mai sauyawa da sauri — shafin sai ya zama kamar yana *rawa*.
hausa.every_periodic_2d_tiling_fits_one_of_1: Kowane fale-falen 2D mai maimaituwa yana shiga ɗaya daga cikin ƙungiyoyin daidaito 17. Escher ya gano wannan lokacin da ya ziyarci Alhambra a 1936; sannan ya kwashe shekaru 30 yana kammala jerin.
hausa.fractal_self_similar_at_every_scale: Fractal — mai kama da kansa a kowane mataki
hausa.mandelbrot_1975_cauliflower_coastlines: Mandelbrot 1975. Kabeji mai fure, gaɓar teku, jijiyoyin jini, walƙiya, ƙananan buhunan huhu — duk fractals ne. “Gizagizai ba ƙwallaye ba ne, duwatsu ba kwanoni ba ne, ɓawon itace kuma ba mai santsi ba ne.”
hausa.css_gives_you_linear_radial_and_conic_: CSS yana ba ka gradient madaidaici, na da'ira, da na conic. Bakan gizo na gaskiya yana da bakan haske mai ci gaba (babu rabe-raben layuka) — “launuka 7 na bakan gizo” zaɓin Newton ne kawai saboda dalilai na kiɗa.
hausa.90s_magic_eye_craze_each_eye_sees_a_sl: Zazzafar sha'awar Magic Eye ta shekarun 90. Kowane ido yana ganin siga da ta ɗan bambanta; idan ka haɗa ko ka raba idanunka daidai, kwakwalwarka za ta haɗa su su zama zurfi. Kusan kashi 5% na mutane da gaske ba sa iya — ba laifinsu ba ne.
hausa.wcag_2_1_normal_text_4_5_1_large_3_1_w: WCAG 2.1: rubutu na yau da kullum 4.5:1, babba 3:1. Dalilin da ya sa ƙarancin bambanci ke cutar da masu raunin gani, ko da kai kana iya karantawa. APCA (magajin WCAG 3.0) yana amfani da haske na fahimta, ba rabon haske kai tsaye ba.
hausa.harmony_lab_hint: Kwatanta tazarar sauti masu jituwa da marasa jituwa, haɗa rabon mitar sauti da tsari, sannan ka juya alaƙar kiɗa zuwa jituwar gani.
hausa.repeats_a_pattern_around_a_central_poi: yana maimaita tsari kewaye da aya ta tsakiya. A cikin
hausa.starfish_5_fold_snowflakes_6_fold_and_: , kifin tauraro (sau 5), ƙanƙarar dusar ƙanƙara (sau 6), da furanni suna nuna wannan a ko'ina.
hausa.tile_patterns_quilts_floor_mosaics: Tsarin fale-fale, bargunan ɗinki, mosaic na bene.
hausa.snowflakes_honeycombs_islamic_star_pat: Ƙanƙarar dusar ƙanƙara, gidan zuma, tsarin tauraron Musulunci.
hausa.mandala_art_rose_windows_in_cathedrals: Fasahar mandala, tagogin fure a manyan majami'u.
hausa.islamic_geometric_art_uses_radial_symm: Fasahar geometry ta Musulunci tana amfani da daidaiton da'ira sosai. Ƙulle-ƙullen Celtic, kayan saƙar Navajo, da tambarin iyalan Japan (“mon”) duk sun dogara ne a kan daidaiton juyawa.
hausa.uses_bilateral_reflection_symmetry_the: yana amfani da daidaiton bangarori biyu (na madubi) — irin wanda ake samu a fuskoki, malam buɗe littafi, da ganye. Shi ne daidaiton da ya fi yawa a duniyar dabbobi.
hausa.cycles_through_the_color_spectrum_as_y: yana zagayawa cikin bakan launuka yayin da kake zana, yana samar da tasirin mandala kamar gradient ta atomatik.
hausa.the_quick_brown_fox_jumps_over_the_laz: Dila mai sauri mai launin ruwan kasa yana tsallake kare mai ƙyuya
hausa.sculpt_failed: Sassaƙan bai yi nasara ba — gwada bayani mafi sauƙi.
hausa.sculpt_presets: Fara daga saitin da aka shirya
hausa.sculpt_create_ph: Ko ka bayyana abin da za a sassaƙa…
hausa.sculpt_gallery_empty: Sassaƙan da aka ajiye za su bayyana a nan.
hausa.maximum_contrast_pop_art_brand_accents: Bambanci mafi girma. Pop art, alamun kamfani.
hausa.vibrant_but_balanced_childrens_books_c: Masu haske amma daidaitattu. Littattafan yara, zane-zanen ban dariya.
hausa.rich_palette_with_two_opposing_pairs: Faifan launi mai wadata da ma'aurata biyu masu adawa.
hausa.rainbow_many_vivid_hues: 🌈 Bakan gizo (launuka masu haske da yawa)
hausa.energetic_playful_childrens_design: Mai kuzari, mai wasa — ƙirar yara.
hausa.adjust_base_hue_saturation_lightness_v: Daidaita hue na asali, saturation, bambancin haske, juyawa, da girman faifan launi. Na'urar tana nuna faifan jituwa kai tsaye kuma tana rarraba shi cikin ɗaya daga cikin nau'ikan jituwa 5. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa — ka gwada ka lura wane haɗi ne ke samar da wace jituwa.
hausa.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Zato (rubutu na kyauta — babu amsa mai kyau): Me ke sa faifan launi ya ji kamar mai jituwa maimakon mai ruɗi?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts_no_answers: 🤔 An makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe (babu amsoshi)
hausa.open_prompts_investigate_by_manipulati: Tambayoyi a buɗe — bincika ta hanyar sauyawa:
hausa.find_the_smallest_palette_that_still_f: Nemo faifan launi mafi ƙanƙanta wanda har yanzu yake jin "cikakke" a gare ka.
hausa.real_impressionists_used_analogous_pal: Masu zanen impressionism na gaskiya sun yi amfani da faifan launi na maƙwabta. Me ya sa kake ganin haka?
hausa.some_color_schemes_have_proper_names_c: Wasu tsarin launi suna da sunaye na hukuma (na cikawa, na cikawa mai rabuwa, na uku). Ka neme su sannan ka gwada sake yin su.
hausa.high_saturation_many_colors_busy_try_d: Saturation mai yawa + launuka da yawa = ruɗani. Gwada rage saturation da sandar gauraya — me ke faruwa ga "jituwa"?
hausa.i_think_i_understand_color_harmony_now: Ina ganin yanzu na fahimci jituwar launi — bari in bayyana shi da kalamai na
hausa.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_hue_s: Bayyana da kalamanka: ta yaya tazarar hue, saturation, da girman faifan launi ke ƙayyade "jituwa"?
hausa.design_note_discrete_5_state_harmony_m: Bayanin ƙira: alamar jituwa mai yanayi 5 daban-daban; dabaran SVG tana nuna wuraren faifan launi; babu makin "faifai mai kyau" — da gangan aka yi haka.
hausa.the_path_traced_by_a_point_on_a_small_: — hanyar da aya da ke kan ƙaramar da'ira mai birgima cikin babbar take bi. Tsarin ya dogara ne a kan
hausa.greatest_common_divisor_of_the_two_rad: (mafi girman lamba mai raba su duka) na radiyoyin biyu. Idan R/r rabo ne mai sauƙi, sai ka sami ƙarancin furanni; rabo mai rikitarwa kuma yana samar da hanyoyi masu sarƙaƙiya waɗanda ba sa maimaituwa ko kaɗan.
hausa.click_or_drag_on_the_canvas_to_create_: 👆 Danna ko ja a kan kanbas don samar da fashewar ƙwayoyi
hausa.click_and_drag_to_drip_paint_on_the_sp: 👆 Danna ka ja domin zubar da fenti a kan kanbas mai juyawa
hausa.in_a_spinning_reference_frame_objects_: A cikin tsarin da yake juyawa, abubuwa suna jin ƙarfin ƙarya na turawa waje wanda ya dace da nisansu daga tsakiya da murabba'in saurin kusurwa (ω²r).
hausa.real_spin_art_uses_centripetal_acceler: Zanen juyawa na gaskiya yana amfani da haɓakar gudu zuwa tsakiya domin yaɗa fenti. Fenti mai sirara yana tashi waje da sauri; mai kauri kuma yana samar da alamu gajeru waɗanda ake sarrafawa sosai.
hausa.why_it_s_beautiful: Dalilin da ya sa yake kyau:
hausa.the_combination_of_rotational_motion_a: Haɗin motsi na juyawa da kaurin fenti yana samar da karkarwa ta ɗabi'a da tsarin cuɗanya. Babu zanen juyawa guda biyu da suka taɓa yin kama da juna — wannan wani nau'i ne na
hausa.from_straight_lines_with_a_circle_and_: daga layuka madaidaita. Da da'ira da mai ninkawa 2, sai ka sami
hausa.the_heart_shaped_curve_seen_in_coffee_: — lanƙwasa mai siffar zuciya da ake gani a cikin kofunan kofi. Mai ninkawa 3 kuma yana yin
hausa.higher_multipliers_create_intricate_pa: . Masu ninkawa mafi girma suna samar da tsari masu sarƙaƙiya waɗanda
hausa.nail_n_connects_to_nail_n_m_mod_total: ke jagoranta: ƙusa N tana haɗuwa da ƙusa (N × M) mod jimlar.
hausa.optical_art_emerged_in_the_1960s_pione: (Fasahar Gani) ta bayyana a shekarun 1960, waɗanda suka fara ta su ne
hausa.it_exploits_the_mechanics_of_human_vis: . Tana amfani da yadda ganin mutum ke aiki domin samar da ruɗanin motsi, girgiza, da zurfi a kan saman faɗi.
hausa.appear_when_two_regular_grids_overlap_: yana bayyana lokacin da grid biyu na yau da kullum suka haɗu a ƙananan kusurwoyi. Kwakwalwarka ba ta iya warware tsari masu karo da juna, sai ta samar da lanƙwasa da igiyoyi na ƙage. Wannan tasirin ne ke haifar da walƙiyar “ƙofar raga” a wasu yadudduka.
hausa.occur_when_highly_saturated_complement: yana faruwa lokacin da launukan cikawa masu saturation mai yawa suka zauna gefe da gefe. Masu karɓar launi na idonka suna gasa, sai a samu gefe mai ƙara da rashin kwanciyar hankali — ana kiran wannan
hausa.in_the_retina_are_the_main_perceptual_: a cikin retina su ne manyan hanyoyin fahimta. Tsarin zobba masu kewaye tsakiya ɗaya yana janyo tsallen ido ba da gangan ba, sai aikin fasahar ya zama kamar yana numfashi da bugawa.
hausa.or_tiling_covers_a_plane_with_shapes_t: (ko shimfiɗa) yana rufe sarari da siffofi masu haɗuwa ba tare da gibi ko cuɗanya ba. Siffofi uku kaɗai na yau da kullum ne ke iya shimfiɗawa su kaɗai:
hausa.regular_hexagons: siffofi masu kusurwa shida na yau da kullum
hausa.1898_1972_transformed_simple_tilings_i: (1898–1972) ya juya shimfiɗa masu sauƙi zuwa fasaha ta hanyar karkatar da gefen fale-falen. Dabararsa: karkatar da gefe ɗaya na siffa sannan ka kwafa karkatar zuwa gefe na gaba, don haka fale-falen su ci gaba da haɗuwa daidai. Wannan shi ne tushen
hausa.uses_tessellations_extensively_combini: tana amfani da fale-fale sosai — tana haɗa taurari, siffofi masu kusurwa shida, da tsari masu sarƙaƙiya da ake gani a masallatai kamar Alhambra. Waɗannan tsare-tsare suna bin ƙaƙƙarfan dokokin lissafi yayin da suke samar da sarƙaƙiyar gani mai ban mamaki.
hausa.tessellations_use_three_key_operations: Fale-fale suna amfani da manyan ayyuka uku —
hausa.flip_every_tessellation_can_be_classif: (jujjuyawa). Kowane fale-fale za a iya rarraba shi bisa ga wace daga cikin waɗannan 'ƙungiyoyin tsarin bango' 17 ya shiga.
hausa.is_generated_by_iterating_z_z_c_for_ev: ana samar da shi ta maimaita z = z² + c ga kowace aya c a sararin lambobi masu rikitarwa. Ayoyin da |z| ke tsayawa cikin iyaka (bai wuce 2 ba) suna 'ciki' saitin. Iyakarsa tana bayyana
hausa.use_the_same_formula_but_fix_c_and_var: suna amfani da tsari ɗaya amma suna daidaita c su sauya z na farko. Kowace aya ta Mandelbrot tana samar da saitin Julia na musamman — ayoyin da ke ciki Mandelbrot suna bayar da Julia masu haɗuwa; na waje kuma suna bayar da 'saitunan Fatou' masu kama da ƙura.
hausa.fractal_modifies_the_iteration_to_z_re: yana sauya maimaitawar zuwa z = (|Re(z)| + i|Im(z)|)² + c, wanda ke samar da siffa marar daidaito mai kama da jirgi mai ci da wuta. Michael Michelitsch da Otto Rössler ne suka gano shi a 1992.
hausa.is_built_by_the_chaos_game_pick_a_rand: ana gina ta da 'wasan rikici': zaɓi aya ba da tsari ba, sannan ka yi tsalle rabin hanya zuwa kusurwar da aka zaɓa ba da tsari ba, ka maimaita. Abin mamaki, wannan tsari na tsautsayi yana samar da fractal mai cikakkiyar kamanceceniya da kanta.
hausa.1924_2010_coined_the_word_fractal_from: (1924–2010) ya ƙirƙiri kalmar 'fractal' daga Latin 'fractus' (karyayye). Ya nuna cewa gaɓar teku, duwatsu, jijiyoyin jini, da kasuwannin hannun jari duk suna nuna geometry na fractal —
hausa.double_click_to_zoom_in_scroll_wheel_t: 👆 Danna sau biyu don ƙara girma • Dabaran gungurawa don ƙara ko rage girma
hausa.screens_create_gradients_by_mixing: 🌈 Allo suna samar da gradient ta hanyar gauraya
hausa.each_pixel_blends_red_green_and_blue_l: . Kowane pixel yana gauraya haske ja, kore, da shuɗi a matakai daban-daban. Gradient yana canja waɗannan darajoji a hankali a faɗin sarari.
hausa.produces_more_perceptually_uniform_gra: yana samar da gradient da suka fi daidaita ga ido fiye da RGB. Tafiya daga ja zuwa shuɗi cikin RGB tana ratsa toka mai laka; cikin HSL kuma tana ratsa shunayya masu haske — kamar yadda mai zane zai gauraya.
hausa.are_everywhere_sunsets_rayleigh_scatte: suna ko'ina: faɗuwar rana (yaɗuwar Rayleigh tana raba tsawon igiyoyin haske), bakan gizo (karkatar haske tana rarraba shi bisa mita), da zurfin teku (ruwa yana shan ja da farko, sai a bar shuɗi mai duhu).
hausa.sweep_color_around_a_center_point_like: suna zagaya launi kewaye da aya ta tsakiya kamar dabaran launi. Ana amfani da su a taswirar kek, da'irar loda, da nuna bayanai. CSS ta ƙara goyon bayan conic-gradient a 2020 kaɗai!
hausa.use_gradients_to_create_depth_direct_a: suna amfani da gradient don samar da zurfi, jagorantar hankali, da tayar da ji. Gradient daga ɗumi zuwa sanyi yana nuna zurfi (hangen sararin iska); daga haske zuwa duhu kuma yana nuna girma (chiaroscuro).
hausa.describe_an_object_for_a_depth_map_or_: Bayyana abu domin taswirar zurfi ko wani laushi domin tsari...
hausa.generate_ai_depth_map: Samar da Taswirar Zurfi da AI
hausa.generate_ai_pattern_tile: Samar da Fale-falen Tsari da AI
hausa.generate_ai_base_tile: 🎨 Samar da Fale-falen Asali da AI
hausa.white_pops_out_gray_middle_black_far: Fari = yana fitowa gaba • Toka = tsakiya • Baƙi = nesa
hausa.your_eyes_are_6_cm_apart: Idanunka suna nesa da juna kusan cm 6
hausa.so_each_sees_the_world_from_a_slightly: , saboda haka kowanne yana ganin duniya daga kusurwa ɗan bambanta. Kwakwalwarka tana haɗa waɗannan ganin biyu domin fahimtar
hausa.magic_eye_images_hide_3d_shapes_in_a_r: (hotunan Magic Eye™) suna ɓoye siffofin 3D cikin tsari mai maimaituwa. Dabarar: inda abin da aka ɓoye yake 'kusa', tsarin yana maimaituwa da
hausa.where_it_s_far_the_period_is_longer_yo: ; inda yake 'nesa' kuma zagayen ya fi tsawo. Kwakwalwarka tana fassara waɗannan bambance-bambancen zagaye a matsayin zurfi.
hausa.1993_94_by_tom_baccei_and_cheri_smith_: (1993–94) na Tom Baccei da Cheri Smith sun sayar da kwafi sama da miliyan 25 a duniya. Dabarar autostereogram ta asali Dr. Christopher Tyler ne ya fara ta a 1979.
hausa.to_see_the_image_hold_your_face_close_: 🧠 Domin ganin hoton: kusanta fuskarka da allon, ka huta idanunka kamar kana kallon 'ta cikin' hoton zuwa bango mai nisa, sannan ka janye a hankali. Siffar 3D za ta 'fito'. Ana kiran wannan
hausa.have_difficulty_seeing_stereograms_due: suna fama da wahalar ganin stereogram saboda yanayi kamar amblyopia (idon ƙyuya), strabismus (idanu masu karkata), ko wasu bambance-bambancen ganin idanu biyu. Wannan al'ada ce gaba ɗaya!
hausa.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_i: Huta idanunka ka duba 'ta cikin' hoton domin ganin 3D
hausa.relax_your_eyes_try_to_look_through_th: Huta idanunka — gwada kallo 'ta cikin' hoton zuwa bangon da ke bayansa
hausa.slowly_move_back_a_3d_shape_will_emerg: Janye a hankali. Siffar 3D za ta bayyana!
hausa.tip_the_two_guide_dots_above_should_ap: Shawara: ɗigogi biyu na jagora da ke sama ya kamata su bayyana a matsayin uku idan idanunka sun daidaita
hausa.create_animated_3d_stereograms_from_pr: Ƙirƙiri stereogram 3D masu motsi daga saitunan da aka shirya, zane-zanenka, hotunan da ka loda, sauye-sauye, ko taswirorin zurfi da AI ta samar!
hausa.draw_a_depth_map_capture_it_as_a_keyfr: Zana taswirar zurfi, ka kama ta a matsayin babban firam, sannan ka zana na gaba. Motsin zai haɗa tsakaninsu.
hausa.export_depth_map_gif: Fitar da GIF ɗin Taswirar Zurfi
hausa.upload_a_grayscale_image_white_near_bl: Loda hoto mai launin toka (fari = kusa, baƙi = nesa). Za a motsa shi da sauyin da ka zaɓa.
hausa.animates_the_depth_map_from_the_static: Yana motsa taswirar zurfi daga shafin Tsaye ta amfani da tasirin sauyin da aka zaɓa. Ka fara koma yanayin Tsaye don zana taswirar zurfinka.
hausa.tip_draw_a_depth_map_in_the_static_tab: 💡 Shawara: Fara zana taswirar zurfi a shafin Tsaye, sannan ka dawo nan ka motsa ta da sauyi.
hausa.ai_generated_depth_map: 🤖 Taswirar Zurfi da AI Ta Samar
hausa.describe_a_3d_scene_and_ai_will_genera: Bayyana wani wuri na 3D sai AI ta samar da taswirar zurfi, sannan ta motsa ta da sauyi.
hausa.e_g_a_glowing_crystal_orb_floating_in_: misali Ƙwallon kristal mai haske yana shawagi a sararin samaniya...
hausa.generate_ai_depth_map_for_animation: Samar da Taswirar Zurfi ta AI domin Motsi
hausa.ai_depth_map_ready: ✅ Taswirar zurfi ta AI a shirye take!
hausa.ai_motion_calls_gemini_to_plan_poses_t: Motsin AI yana kiran Gemini domin tsara matsayi sannan Imagen domin zana kowane firam a matsayin taswirar zurfi ta kansa. Kusan daƙiƙa 5–7 ga kowane firam; ba ya ƙetare iyakar amfani.
hausa.ai_image_generation_is_not_available_u: ⚠️ Samar da hoto da AI ba ya samuwa. Yi amfani da yanayin Saitin shirye, Zana, Loda, ko Sauyi maimakon haka.
hausa.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_a: Huta idanunka ka duba 'ta cikin' motsin domin ganin siffofin 3D suna motsi
hausa.lock_your_eyes_into_the_3d_view_before: Kafa idanunka a duban 3D kafin ka danna Kunna
hausa.slower_speeds_4_6_fps_are_easier_to_ma: Ƙananan gudu (4–6 FPS) sun fi sauƙin kiyaye hankali
hausa.pulse_and_heart_presets_are_the_easies: Saitunan Bugawa da Zuciya su ne mafi sauƙin gani suna motsi
hausa.the_exported_gif_can_be_printed_frame_: Za a iya buga GIF ɗin da aka fitar firam bayan firam a matsayin littafin juya shafuka!
